Package io.mdudel.zenoh.purejava.session

Class ZenohSession

java.lang.Object
io.mdudel.zenoh.purejava.session.ZenohSession
All Implemented Interfaces:
AutoCloseable
public final class ZenohSession extends Object implements AutoCloseable
A Zenoh 1.x client session over any Transport.

Owns:

  • The 4-message handshake ceremony (InitSyn / InitAck / OpenSyn / OpenAck) — see open().
  • The reader thread that consumes inbound frames after handshake and dispatches KEEP_ALIVE / CLOSE server-driven messages.
  • The KEEP_ALIVE scheduler (fires at lease/4 intervals when the outbound side has been quiet).
  • The lease-expiry watchdog (tears down if the inbound side has been quiet for a full lease period).
  • Publish serialisation over the transport (transport already serialises send(), but the session adds a monotonic sequence number per frame).

The transport passed in is owned by the session after open(): closing the session closes the transport. The transport is not connected by the session — call Transport.connect() beforehand, or use ZenohSession.Builder.autoConnect(boolean) to let the session do it.

Publish-only client SPI in the MVP: publish(String, byte[]) and variants. Subscribe / query are out of scope for the publisher.

Threading:

  • open() is single-threaded (call from one thread once).
  • publish(String, byte[]) is safe from any thread; frames serialise cleanly on the underlying transport lock.
  • close() is idempotent and safe from any thread.

    • builder

    • transport

      public Transport transport()

    • open

      public void open() throws SessionException
      Perform the four-message handshake and enter SessionState.OPEN. Blocks up to ZenohSession.Builder.handshakeTimeoutMs(int) per receive step.
      Throws:
      SessionException - on any handshake failure, protocol violation, or timeout; the session is placed in SessionState.CLOSED before rethrow.

    • publish

      public void publish(String keyExpr, byte[] payload) throws SessionException
      Publish a payload under a key expression. Wraps the payload in PUT → PUSH → FRAME and hands to the transport.
      Throws:
      SessionException

    • publish

      public void publish(String keyExpr, byte[] payload, Encoding encoding) throws SessionException
      Publish with an explicit encoding.
      Throws:
      SessionException

    • publishString

      public void publishString(String keyExpr, String payload) throws SessionException
      Publish a UTF-8 string with the standard string-encoding tag.
      Throws:
      SessionException

    • publishJson

      public void publishJson(String keyExpr, String json) throws SessionException
      Publish a JSON string with the application/json encoding tag.
      Throws:
      SessionException

    • declareSubscriber

      public Subscription declareSubscriber(KeyExpr keyExpr) throws SessionException
      Declare a subscription against the router for the given key expression (may contain wildcards; see KeyExpr). Sends a DECLARE + DeclareSubscriber to the router and returns a Subscription handle backed by a blocking queue.

      Repeated calls with equal KeyExprs are treated as distinct subscriptions — each gets its own id, its own DECLARE, and its own inbox. A single inbound message that matches N of them will be delivered to all N.

      Throws:
      SessionException

    • declareSubscriber

      public Subscription declareSubscriber(String keyExpr) throws SessionException
      Sugar for declareSubscriber(KeyExpr) taking a string.
      Throws:
      SessionException

    • declareInterest

      public long declareInterest(Interest.Mode mode, int options, String keyExpr, ZenohSession.DiscoveryListener listener) throws SessionException
      Send an INTEREST message asking the router to notify us of DECLARE records matching the given key expression. Returns the interest id; pass it to finalInterest(long) later to stop receiving updates (only meaningful for Future / CurrentFuture modes).

      The listener is called on the session reader thread for every DECLARE the router sends carrying this interest's id, in the order they arrive. Keep it fast — slow callbacks block session inbound processing.

      Parameters:
      mode - Interest lifecycle mode
      options - OR of Interest.OPT_KEYEXPRS / SUBSCRIBERS / QUERYABLES / TOKENS bits
      keyExpr - restrict to this KE, or null to interest in all
      listener - callback for each matching DECLARE
      Returns:
      the interest id (use with finalInterest(long))
      Throws:
      SessionException

    • finalInterest

      public void finalInterest(long interestId) throws SessionException
      Terminate a running Future / CurrentFuture interest.
      Throws:
      SessionException

    • close

      public void close()
      Specified by:
